newsletter.success: Thanks for subscribing! Your exclusive code is on its way.

comingSoon.body: We're working on this section. It will be available very soon.

footer.description: A modern, comfortable hotel in downtown Chiclayo. Book direct on our site and enjoy attentive service on every stay.
footer.discountBody: Subscribe and get your discount straight to your inbox.

hero.lead: A stay designed for you in the heart of the historic center: modern rooms, warm hospitality, and experiences crafted so the city feels yours from the very first moment.

presentation.lead: Book direct on our site and save on your next trip to Chiclayo. A stay designed down to the last detail, with the warmth of a boutique hotel steps from the historic center.
presentation.whatsappPrefill: Hi, I'd like info to book at Zentra Hotel.
presentation.cardTitle: Three reasons to skip the middleman.
presentation.perkLocationDetail: Five minutes from Plaza de Armas.
presentation.perkPriceDetail: Book direct and save on every night.
presentation.perkCareDetail: Reception and room service always ready.

offers.lead: Exclusive discounts for guests who book direct with us. Pick the code that fits your stay best and use it when you book.
offers.couponPrefill: Hi, I'd like to book. Discount code: {code}

services.lead: Every detail thought out so you only have to worry about resting. 5G Wi-Fi, buffet breakfast, 24/7 service, and touches that make your stay simple, comfortable, and safe.

roomsShowcase.lead: Choose from cozy rooms, suites with jacuzzi, and curated experiences. Every space is designed for a different rhythm — work, rest, or celebration.
roomsShowcase.bentoTagline2: Double bed plus an extra for friends or family.
roomsShowcase.bentoTagline3: Private jacuzzi, warm light, and city views.
roomsShowcase.bentoTagline4: Romantic dinner prepared by our team.

zen.leadA: Discover why we're one of the best
zen.leadB: . Every ritual is designed for a real pause — massages, aromatherapy, and rest in the heart of the city.

traveler.lead: Rooms, services, and experiences designed for every reason you travel: business, tourism, celebrations, or full-on rest in the heart of Chiclayo.

booking.lead: Book direct and save on your next stay. Pick the channel you prefer — we reply in minutes, with no middleman fees.
booking.channelWhatsappPrefill: Hi, I'd like to book a room.

availability.lead: Choose from our most-requested rooms. All include 5G Wi-Fi, breakfast, and flexible cancellation when you book direct with us.

testimonials.lead: Real reviews from those who already experienced Zentra. Short stories of comfortable stays, warm hospitality, and memorable moments in downtown Chiclayo.

location.lead: Our location on {balta}, {plaza}, and {sanJose} puts you steps from Av. Balta and the city's main shopping, dining, and tourist spots.

bookingWidget.heading: Check availability
bookingWidget.footnote: No hidden fees · Flexible cancellation · Instant confirmation

hero.titleA: Your team is up and running from
hero.lead: Pick executive lodging at any of our 3 hotels, plus premium coworking spaces.
hero.whatsappPrefill: Hi, I'd like info on the Zentra Hotel & Cowork corporate agreement.

locations.lead: Wherever your team stays, they're always minutes from the financial district and Nexus Cowork offices. Pick the location that suits you best.

problem.eyebrow: The invisible cost of business travel
problem.title: Does your team travel to Chiclayo?
problem.lead: Bring lodging, workspace, and meetings together in one solution for your company. Less admin, more productivity.

solution.lead: We're the first corporate hub in Chiclayo that brings a chain of three executive hotels and a premium coworking together under one agreement. Your team is ready to operate from minute one.
solution.whatsappPrefill: Hi, I'd like info on the Zentra Hotel & Cowork corporate agreement.
solution.zentraTitle: Three downtown locations designed for the business traveler.
solution.zentraLead: Comfort, technology, and service with no wait times. Rooms designed for teams that work late and start early.
solution.nexusTitle: Private offices, coworking, and fully equipped meeting rooms.
solution.nexusLead: Your team works with the same tools as at HQ, uninterrupted. A single point of contact, friction-free operation.

plans.lead: Four tiers based on how many people travel each month. The more your team grows, the better the terms and the more services included.
plans.whatsappPrefill: Hi, I'd like info on the Zentra Hotel & Cowork corporate agreement.
plans.whatsappPlanPrefill: Hi, I'd like info on the {plan} of the Zentra Hotel & Cowork corporate agreement.

sectors.titleA: Companies already traveling and working with
sectors.lead: Corporate teams from different industries choose Zentra Hotel & Cowork for their operations in Chiclayo.
sectors.marqueeAria: Companies that trust Zentra Hotel & Cowork
sectors.closingNote: Isn't your company here yet? Tell us how your team operates. Our account executive will build a proposal tailored to you.

benefits.titleEmphasis: solution for your team in Chiclayo.
benefits.lead: When you sign your agreement with Zentra Hotel & Cowork, your company gets terms no hotel in Chiclayo can offer you in an integrated way.

gallery.lead: All photos are of the real Zentra chain and Nexus Cowork spaces in Chiclayo.

video.titleA: Watch a team operate at the
video.lead: This is what a full day of operation looks like for your team in Chiclayo: from express check-in to a desk at Nexus, friction-free.
video.whatsappPrefill: Hi, I'd like to schedule a meeting to review the Zentra Hotel & Cowork corporate proposal.

cta.formLead: Basics to build the proposal. Everything else, we sort out over WhatsApp.

advisorFloat.label: Talk to an advisor
advisorFloat.prefill: Hi, I'd like to talk to an advisor about the Zentra Hotel & Cowork corporate agreement.

aside.title: An executive will reach out within 24 hours.
aside.lead: Fill out the form and our team will design a proposal tailored to your company. No commitments.
aside.whatsappPrefill: Hi, I'd like info on the Zentra Hotel & Cowork corporate agreement.

form.labelFrequency: How many people travel and how often?
form.errorCompany: Enter the company or legal name.
form.errorPhone: Enter a valid phone or WhatsApp number.
form.errorFrequency: Tell us how often your team travels.
form.hint: On submit, we open WhatsApp with your proposal pre-loaded at {phone}. No commitments.
form.successLead: We opened WhatsApp with your proposal pre-loaded. An account executive will contact you within 24 business hours.
form.waMessageLead: Hi, I'd like to activate a corporate agreement with Zentra Hotel & Cowork.

hero.lead: Zentra was born with a simple conviction: traveling for work or rest shouldn't feel impersonal. We combine prime location, warm design, and a human team that treats every stay like the first.
hero.whatsappPrefill: Hi, I'd like to know more about Zentra Hotel.

values.lead: Every decision, from where our locations are to our welcome ritual, is designed so your rest feels genuinely cared for.

experience.lead: We simplify every touchpoint so your only concern is enjoying the city. Here's what a Zentra stay looks like:

hero.titleEmphasis: the room your trip calls for.
hero.lead: From the single designed for work to the suite with jacuzzi for celebrating, in Balta, Plaza, or San José. Filter by location and find the room you want.

explorer.emptyTitle: No rooms loaded for this location.
explorer.emptyLead: Message us on WhatsApp and we'll help you find the best option.

detail.waPending: Hi, I'm interested in the {room} at {sede}. Could you confirm photos, rate, and availability?
detail.waExperience: Hi, I'd like to book the "{room}" experience at Zentra Hotel.
detail.waConsult: Hi, I'm interested in the {room} at Zentra Hotel. Could you send me more info?

hero.lead: Local guides, travel tips, and stories from the house. What we tell guests before they arrive — so the city and the hotel feel yours from day one.
Long stays, workation, first coworking day. Pick the location near you and grab the deal with a direct booking. All include 5G Wi-Fi and breakfast.

explorer.emptyLead: Message us on WhatsApp and we'll put one together for you.
